reviews.review_description: Nothing too fancy here, you can change the patterns and stuff.

reviews.review_title: It's good 3D. I've seen better, though
reviews.review_description: Not a lot of content, so unless you're interested in the particular apartments they have on display, this app is not your best option for architectural experiences (I'd recommend theViewer instead). But this one has sharp 3D high quality images too.
